name: Orion Sprite Atlas Capture
description: Inert Orion at origin with a backdrop of one yellow sun and three planet billboards. Mirrors centurion_sprite_atlas.json + galaxy_sprite_atlas.json — the Orion is non-combat (alive=false skips perception/AI/firing) so the planets and sun are pure scenery for sprite-light authoring without the ship spawning hostile or getting attacked. 60 m display (matches the Troy convoy length); player parked 100 m back along +Z so the gunship fills ~40% of the screen at spawn for clean F2 light-spot placement. Three Helen planet billboards in the background give the eye a sense of scale and let dorsal/ventral camera angles still have something to look at. F4 atlas viewer reads the same atlas_manifest the in-system Orion uses — edits to one cell propagate everywhere.
